Next page 1 Grows Twice As Much 2 100% Natural & Organic 3 Feeds For 3 Months 4 Pet & Child Friendly A high performance and 100% organic feed for fruit and vegetables Performance Organics from Miracle-Gro is the breakthrough range of 100% natural gardening products that still grows twice as big, but organically. Ideal for growing your own produce such as fruits and vegetables - this organic plant food is 100% natural, and will give you tastier produce in abundance and nourish them for up to 3 months. Our plant-based specialist formula is child, pet and bee friendly. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics Fruit & Veg Granular Plant Food? Fruit and vegetable plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow tastier produce in abundance! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics Fruit & Veg Granular Plant Food? Ideal for growing your own produce such as fruits and vegetables. Perfect for use in hanging baskets, pots and containers indoor and out. When should I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics Fruit & Veg Granular Plant Food? Use every 4-6 weeks when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro Performance Organics Fruit & Veg Granular Plant Food? Using the guide measure out the recommended dose. Lightly work the granules into the soil around your plant. After application give your plant a good drink. We recommend using the Miracle-Gro Performance Organics composts to get even better results. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from food and feed. Do not apply in areas where food is grown or where pets or children may come into contact with the treated area.
